146,Discussion on Status bar,"Hello Yakin,

I want to start working on the Status Bar for Manna

I would like to have a Status Bar similar to the one you have on Business Lab or one that Domino&rsquo
column2:
s Pizza uses .There Tracker tracks the orders / pizza showing you each stage of prep to your door
Purpose: The purpose of the status bar is to keep the case manager aware of the different phases of the acceptance process without having to make multiple calls to update on the status of acceptance.

1. This lessees the work load of both our members and the case managers
2. Case manager can check status of their request and members can stay in communication without being hounded by multiple phone calls

167,Create 'Browse by Industry | Technology Pages',"

We would like to have 2 new pages, that are a bit similar to the /locations page we have already.

Instead of showing all locations that have at least 1 member, the new pages will show all industries that have at least 1 member or all technologies that have at least one member.

The page will list all the industries or technologies, the page list each company that has matches those industries or technologies by listing the company name, which will be linked to the company page.

The two pages can be listed at:

/technologies
and
/industries

The main purpose of these pages is to ensure that every listing gets indexed, like a dynamic sitemap. These pages should be linked in the footer of the site - right beneath 'Browse Locations' we will add 'Browse Technologies' and 'Browse Industries'.
From the Comment by Dave in trello card:
The page can be a simple text page, since it's mostly just a sitemap. It can be in a format like:
And will be the same format for industries.

168,Manage Account Page: New tab for internal only fields,"We are collecting some info for internal use only. Right now, they are on the 'listing details' section of the 'manage account' area.

Would it be possible to create a new, fifth tab on the manage account page for these? We'd like to have a new tab called 'Internal Info'.

At the top of the tab, there would be a tip that says 'The fields below are for internal use only...."" just like there is now.

Then the 7 fields in that section would be moved to that new tab.

The reason for this feature is that the companies who use our site are always careful to reveal their rates, and we don't want them to think that they are putting their detailed rate info onto the public site.",2,13-01-2019 02:33,24-01-2019,25-01-2019,18-03-2019 17:27,1,0,5,NULL,0,0,NULL,0,0,0,NULL,30,project,0,1,1,18,0,0,0,0,1,0
169,Custom Sidebar: Show hard-coded links depending on profile,"<div class=""window-module"">
<div class=""current markeddown hide-on-edit js-card-desc js-show-with-desc"" dir=""auto"">
We'd like to have a custom sidebar developed, to help SEO by putting custom links to our website on the directory profile pages.
(1) This will be displayed as a sidebar on every member page.
(2) The side bar will display 4 text links to related content on our main website,

(3) The module would be hardcoded with a set of approximately 20+ articles/videos/content on the main site. The links/text won't be changing much, so it's fine if we have to go into the code for the module and manually change the links/text that is displayed. No need for any interface for that.
(4) Each time a profile is displayed, the module will company the country, skills, and industry for the company being displayed.
-if the country of the listing was Ukraine, the system would show a link like ""Learn More: Outsourcing To Ukraine""
If one of the industries of the company listing was 'Gambling', a link could be displayed like ""10 Tips For Building A Gambling Site""
if one of the skills was .Net, a link could be displayed like 'Finding Great .Net Developers""

(5) There would be multiple links hardcoded into the system so if there were more than one match, the system would choose randomly which one to choose. For example ,there could be 5 different links associated with the skill 'Javascript' so if a company listing had JavaScript as a skill, the sidebar module would randomly choose one.
(6) The sidebar will always attempt to show 4 links like this:

(a) a link related to the country of the company listing
(b) a link related to one of the industry listed on the company listing
(c) a link related to one of the skills listed on the company listing
(d) this link will always be the same - "" 2018 Global Software Pricing Report""
(5) If there are no matches with country/industry/skills on the company listing, a set of 4 default links will be shown.

170,Improve Progress Indicator,"Improvements to the progress indicator:

569,Post Job Feature along with signup/sign in.,"<table>

1. If an user clicks on post a job button, they are directed to a unique designed page. The page will have sign in and signup options in one screen split. Left side of the screen to sign in, right side to signup. Or we can have just the signup with sign in links in bottom of the sign up form. The sign in links in the signup form helps your existing users to sign in.

2. Once user signs in or signups, the system will allow them to post the job listing. Every free member should have one job post as free at least so we have something for every one to get our foot in the door of recruiters.



3. We shall setup three emails. First email to go to all the free retruiter members after 24hours of free signup presenting the benefits of postign a job on your site and motivating them to use the free limit which they have on their account for posting a free job.

Second email will go to the free recruiter member as they post their first job, this email to motivate the free members to upgrade to paid plan

Third email will go to the free recuiter member after 10days from the date of second email sent. This email shall carry a different angle to motivate the free recruiter member to upgrade to a paid plan. This email should not go out if in case the free recruiter member has already upgraded.

During the process, when the recruiters click on upgrade link on the email or from inside the dashboard, the upgrade page will be the default page which BD has in place.

Let's keep 1 or 2 job post for free in the free tier as well. So let them taste the experience being on your website and using it for posting their job vacancies. This is what indeed.com used to do allowing 2 job posts for free.

Notes:

We can also demand $$ fee for each and every job posts to free members when they have exhausted their free 1 or 2 job post limits. Same thing we need to showcase in our ""custom upgrade page"" that in free tier they get 1 job post for free and $10 (for example) for every job post they post. In Silver plan they get 10 job posts and set of benefits for only $69 and in Gold Plan they get 20 job posts and set of benefits at only $119. (These plans are just an example for you.)

If the member clicks on upgrade to any plan as shown on custom upgrade page - they complete the payment process and then they are routed to the job post feature form where they fill up all the details to post a job.

If the member clicks on ""I don't want to upgrade and am happy with free plan"" - they still go to the job post feature form and are able to post a job. If they have not finished their free limit, the job will be posted live. If they have already consumed their free limits, they will be asked for $$ for publishing the job post. Another way for you to see if any free members are paying you per job, you can further followup with them and show the benefits of subscription plan.
1. Let us keep the job search results page (just the first page) visible to every one. This gives your early users a way to trust you that ""yes, on your website you have some real jobs posted"".
2. If they click on page 2 or load more to get more jobs visible on the screen - they are prompted to sign in or signup as a job seeker free member.
3. If an user is not logged in, and, if they click on any job results to get more details of the specific job post - they are prompted to login or create a free job seeker free account.

907,LawScore page text,"LawScore page text

JustGreatLawyers LawScore

LawScoreTM is JustGreatLawyer&rsquo
column2: s attempt to evaluate both the completeness of a lawyer&rsquo
column3: s profile as well as their experience and background. Typically, when a lawyer is initially licensed, he or she may not have very much information to provide to prospective clients. As each lawyer gains experience, she may publish in journals or speak at conferences. Likewise, with each year of practice comes a wealth of experience. In order to provide the best possible experience for prospective clients on our site as well as fairly evaluate an attorney&rsquo
column5:
ve created LawScoreTM.

What Is LawScore?
LawScoreTM is a rating system that adds points on the basis of profile completeness, years of experience, and reviews received.
On an attorney&rsquo
column6:
s profile, the more information the attorney provides, the higher the rating. Each section represents an opportunity for an attorney to increase his or her rating if there is relevant information that may be added.
LawScoreTM is based on a scale from 0 to 100.
The higher an attorney&rsquo
column7:
s LawScoreTM, the higher their ranking is likely to be on a given search result page on our platform. We do this because we find that visitors to our site strongly prefer complete profiles with lots of informative content to profiles that are incomplete.

How Can I Increase My LawScore
Some rating factors, such as number of years in practice, whether you&rsquo
column8:
ve had speaking opportunities, or published your work in peer-reviewed journals, cannot be easily influenced. However, there is much that you can do to increase your LawScoreTM.
Claim your profile and fill out as much information as possible.
Add a badge to your website to brag about your JustGreatLawyers profile.
Request reviews to make your profile stand out.
JustGreatLawyers paid members receive an added boost to their LawScoreTM based on how many years they maintain a paid membership.

What LawScore Does Not Do
LawScoreTM does not evaluate an attorney&rsquo
column9: s ability to handle any legal matter. Factors such as knowledge of an area of law, experience with similar cases or matters, number of cases tried to verdict, number of deals, personality, communication style, experience before a particular judge or in any given venue. All of these are potentially important factors when evaluating whether to hire a lawyer and are concerns better answered by reading any available reviews, publications, and listening to videos and speaking engagements. Ultimately, the best tool a prospective client has is to speak with a lawyer to discuss their legal matter and determine if they feel comfortable moving forward with the representation.",2,11-01-2020 01:06,11-01-2020,NULL,28-01-2022 23:22,10,0,5,NULL,0,0,NULL,0,0,0,NULL,77,project,0,1,0,0,0,0,0,0,1,0

1199,Increase page load times ,"All of the seo checker tools say the website loads slow. If we can look at ways to speed this up without compromising any of the existing seo ranking that would be great.
Please let me know why you think things load as slow as they do , what we would do to fix it , and if that should impact the sites seo in a negative way to achieve faster load speeds.

1200,Onpage SEO,"Nicholas message to us pasted below:

My biggest thing is maintaining our SEO ranking. We are number one on bing for almost every search in America. For example:
Texas suboxone doctor
Suboxone doctors in san Antonio
Suboxone doctors in Denver
Suboxone doctor near me

ETC etc

Since November we have cracked the front page on google for state searches, but not the city searches. So searches like

Suboxone doctors in Florida (theres almost 2000 and we show up 4-5)
Suboxone doctors in Indiana
Suboxone doctors in Delaware

Etc etc

I think this is happening because we have the states all linked and listed on the home page..


Who can I talk to about the seo impact of adding the 50 largest cities to the bottom of the page? Places like Houston, Los Angeles , baltimore , the same way we have 50 states.

Would a change like this potentially lower our existing rankings?

Would it make sense that having the top 50 cities in the country short cut onto homepage would get google to raise those city rankings when people search?

1701,Changes for Version 1 dot 2,"

conversation pasted, hence need to define specifically on each and create checklist
If possible, we'd also like to make the following temporary changes.
-Replace the ""Make Summer Smarter"" graphic with a very simple ""Free community resources for families and youth impacted by COVID-19"" graphic. This would shift to something new later.
<div>-Temporarily remove the ""Grade"" and ""Cost"" search menus and replace ""Access"" with ""Resources""&nbsp

column2: ""Food Assistance,"" ""Basic Supplies Assistance,"" ""Education Assistance,"" ""Volunteer Assistance,"" ""Transportation Assistance,"" ""Child Care Assistance,"" ""Meeting Space/Facilities,"" ""Cash Assistance"" under resources (this list may grow, and everything would need to be on the form, too)

""Food Assistance,"" ""Education Assistance,"" ""Volunteer Assistance,"" ""Transportation Assistance,"" ""Child Care Assistance,"" I meant treat them as sub-categories to the ""Resources"" field. We'll also want to add sub-categories for ""Hygienic Supplies,"" and ""Basic Household Supplies""

column1: -Under ""Type,"" replace existing values with ""Hosted at Facility,"" ""Delivered to Home,"" ""Online,"" and ""Other."" We may need to add a few values here, too.
We also need the following permanent change (for now and when we return to the main site)

-The recurring event feature you've developed is currently by day, with an entry for every day. Is it possible for it to have defined start and end dates with one entry (so it doesn't populate repeated in the search results field but is searchable by start and end dates and can include irregular day patterns)

1702,"Bug or issues notified in version 1 (Mar 18, 2020, 4:31 AM)","

Hi team,

I've created several programs, both through the manual entry and bulk upload process. This mostly looks great. Although I noticed a few things that should probably be addressed before moving on to the round 2 work.

column2: the time fields aren't mapping correctly in the bulk upload (unless this was as a user error)

column1: 2) I've tried several times now, but the bulk upload appears to be only uploading the first line of data. Are there some required fields I'm missing, or maybe special characters causing issues? I've attached the.csv I attempted to upload.

3) for some odd reason, the Google Maps API for programs is giving all programs the same title. It's also listing the end date as the end of the first iteration of the program, rather than the final end date
4) As I've mentioned earlier, we would ideally want one line per program in the program search results section.
Link to google sheet is in below comments by Yakin Shah and this sheet can be downloaded as a csv for test and ensure test is successful.

1981,Coupon purchase process v1,"

V1: Coupon purchase process to be developed for BLabs inside DirectoryToolkit.

- Not signed in members sees the coupon post (it will be a post from the digital download, and the particular post id to be rendered outside the post type in unique page)
- Members opt to buy the coupon and make the payment and goes to the next page post-purchase. During this process, they enter name, email, card details and make the purchase >

- Logged in members also see it, but when they try to purchase, the email and name fields are pre-filled, and they need to enter just the card details. Post payment, go to a confirmation page.

- Once the payment is done(customer receives an email, a template to trigger, Ryan to change the content of template later), Upon payment of this coupon purchase, a coupon number to be created uniquely for every customer.

- Another page where the customer goes and submits their message to buy services or products listed on DirectoryToolkit. The credits to be accounted and logged to reduce as and when they opt for something.

2042,Review and Rewards - Version 1,"Review and Rewards V1
• The business owner creates a secret deal.
• The business owner invites their existing customer daily (their every walk-in customer on a daily basis)
• We will use the Default BD email system for now. If our business and their email limits cross 1k per day, we will have to plan version 2.
• The business owner will have a page to add a customer info one by one.
• The business will have an option to upload CSV file with up to 50 customers or 100 customers all at once.
• The business owner will have the opportunity to define their own email template and attach their deal and press send.
• The customers receive the email to review. We will also include advanced Twilio integration to send SMS also if needed.

• The customer gets an email or even SMS(if we built) with a link to review. When the customer reviews, the review goes live directly. The customer receives a thank you email as submitting the review.
• The customer gets the email with the secret deal information. The customer can walk into the business and showing this email copy.
<li>The business owner will have a dashboard to see all the customers who reviewed and have an available deal active.&#160
• The business owner needs to confirm to redeem the deal for the customer. Hence, a customer cannot use the same deal more than once.
Version 2 of this module can contain more and more advanced things.",2,15-04-2020 14:05,15-04-2020,NULL,16-05-2025 13:12,1,0,5,NULL,0,0,NULL,0,0,0,NULL,159,project,0,1,0,0,0,0,0,0,1,0

2836,"Creating a new filter for listings, independent of categories","Hi Yakin,

As you know, my directory highlights women-owned businesses. I would like each business to also be able to indicate if they also belong to a number of different categories (black-owned, queer-owned, immigrant-owned, etc.)

These categories would be completely independent of the current category structure. I would like this to be a completely separate field. And I would like to include it on the sidebar of search results so that users can filter by these categories within whatever current search they have made. It would be similar to filtering by star rating.

What would be the cost and time associated with creating an independent category like this as well as the ability to filter by this category in the search results sidebar?

If it fits in my budget I am ready to get started right away.

Thanks,
Sam",2,11-06-2020 21:21,11-06-2020,NULL,02-07-2020 18:23,30,1,5,NULL,0,0,NULL,0,0,0,NULL,173,project,0,1,0,0,0,0,0,0,1,0

4913,THT Plus: Company member to add employees for free and paid accounts,"Main Task 1: THT+
1. Members would submit a form while entering the name and email address(or any other mandatory details needed by the system and/or by our website(admin decision). Member(company/client) can decide which one has to go for free, and which of their employees to be offered the paid plan.

------------------------

2. Upon submission of the request form, as mentioned in above step 1, the notification email goes to admin so that admin can come to the plugin inside admin panel to view details.

------------------------

3. A plugin will be built where the admin can see which company sent the request, who all are the employees, and how many free / how many paid.

In the plugin, the admin can amend the individual's name and/or email address before processing accounts. But once the process accounts button is clicked, then there won't be any amendments possible.

If there will be 20 different companies ordered to create accounts for their employees, you will have a list of all twenty companies with respective 20 ""process accounts"" buttons. So, you can just create/process accounts for one company at a time.

------------------------

4. Admin manually has to create a new order in the finance section in the admin. Admin further has to communicate manually/personally with the client(member) that they have an order in their dashboard and help the member in navigating and getting that paid. However we can build an email template to be used by the admin, but the admin manually sends this email template.

**BULK Upload feature to be provided here in this page**
Company member can just click on upload file, download a sample file, fill the sample file as per our given format, upload it and they will be able to see the data once uploaded, and they need to click on ""Submit order request"" button and in a few moments, the admin plugin will get that order.

------------------------

5. When payment is done, the admin gets a notification from Stripe/PayPal. Admin then manually /personally comes to the admin >
column2:
plugin and click on a button ""Process Accounts"" and all those free / paid accounts to get created.

These accounts will be created under two different membership levels ""Company Sponsored Free Accounts"" and ""Company Sponsored Paid Accounts""
column3:
hence two separate membership plan IDs.
*Note:* Any person/individual outside of the company if they wish to have a paid account, can join the site on the paid plan from the landing page/join page selecting the appropriate plan or whichever way you(Peter &
column4:
Team) likes the navigation to be.

In the company member dashboard, they will see the status as ""Order pending"" and when the accounts are processed by the plugin at admin, the company dashboard will get updated with ""Account Live"" and there will be one more column for ""free or paid"". .

A similar view will be given in either the same admin plugin (or in an additional plugin) at admin so admin are speaking on phone with any company, admin can understand what they are talking about.

------------------------

6. When the admin clicks on the ""Process Accounts"" button from the admin>
column6:
the respective accounts get created. All the individuals will receive the email notification (Text needs to be provided by Peter). Post the accounts are created, the admin can personally mail to the main company as well.


------------------------

7. We will also build the ability for company members to add more employees or remove existing employees.

When this is done, one more order will get created and shown in the admin plugin as well as the member/company dashboard.

The financial part of it is going to happen outside of the site.

When the admin clicks on ""process"" in the admin plugin, the account gets removed or ""on hold"" so the admin can market to them, and new accounts get created as well.

--------------------------

8. Bulk Upload feature:
Company member can just click on upload file, download a sample file, fill the sample file as per our given format, upload it and they will be able to see the data once uploaded, and they need to click on ""Submit order request"" button and in a few moments, the admin plugin will get that order.

column1: 6836,Project Submission Process Flow,"Project Submission Process Flow starts from the point where a Writer submits the project
• Client has 3 days of time to accept or request edit
• If client don't accept or request edit in 3 days, it automatically stands as accepted.
• Writer has three days to submit the revision work.

• If writer don't submit the revision work in 3 days, it auto sets to Alarm and it notifies the writer for one more chance of 2 days before client can decide either to give more time or reject the project and get refund.
• If writer submits, its back to step 2.
<li>If client accepts, or project is set to accepted stage, the deposits by the client are released to the writer.
• Status of payment paid from PPW to writers account.
• All projects and total money spent on each projects.

It looks like the issue you're referring to is caused by custom code added to your site.

I do want to help, but because your site is heavily customized and the issue seems to be related to your custom coding, I would recommend working with your developer to try and resolve the issue - I don't want to edit something that further complicates the issue for you. This article should assist on troubleshooting this:
Steps To Identify Which Custom Widget/Code Is Causing An Issue

7384,Automatic Account Active status changes to inactive,"Automatic Account Active status changes to inactive

What we will do:

1. We will write a script which, if triggered to run, checks all the members whose last active date was the same day of last year, making them inactive.

2. The plugin to show a report where you can see how many members have been turned to inactive by this script.

3. The automation script which triggers our main script to run once per day.

4. The report will show you exactly who were inactivated by the script, with the one click option for admin to make them activate again.

5. When the admin activates them again, the last activated date in the database changes to the current date, so next year when the script runs once per day, it does its job.

6. The plugin will have a button to click if the admin wishes to run that script manually.

7461,Homepage and Search results page Filters and Search Algo (Part 1 - A and B),"Part 1a - Home Page
Although we last discussed having separate pages for the top level categories, we believe that the best user experience will be combining all the businesses on our directory via the search results page.

On the home page, we have changed the search box call to action to ""Top+Sub+Location Search"". In the event that a user selects Online Shops as a top level category, we don't want the user to have the ability to input the location. The location search function should work for every other top level category that we currently have.


Part 1b - Search Results Page
Instead of using the filters that we previously mentioned in our initial email, we would like to use the ""Bootstrap Theme - Search Module - Top_Sub_Sub-Sub_Location"" widget with minor edits below:
We would like the first dropdown to be based on the top level category
We would like the second dropdown to be based on the sub level category that relates to the top level category that a user selects. A user should not be able to select a sub level category unless they select a top level category first.
If a user chooses the Online Shop top level category, they shouldn't have the ability to enter anything in the location field. If a user doesn't choose a top level or sub level category, but they enter a location, we don't want any of the Online Shop businesses to show up in the results.
Essentially, the Search Module on the Search Results page needs to be as close to functionality as possible as the Home Page Call to Action.

7718,W3 - Step 7: Meeting 4 - Handover and Launch Support,"*Step 7: Meeting #4 - Handover and Launch Support*

In this step, we hand over the website to you and you are ready to launch.


During the handover, we will train you with the Brilliant Directories software. We will show you how to change categories or manage members and content, and answer any other questions that you may have. After working with the BD Growth Suite Team, you will not need any additional support from a VA for daily management or backend maintenance of our website. We will give you the skills required to do things yourself.

We, however, provide you with 1 week of free launch support that specifically includes any content additions or blog articles additions, or clearing your additional questions on the software. Simply create a support ticket or email us, and seek assistance from us.

You can even write a few articles and send them to us (during the launch support week). We will upload those on your website to help build your credibility from the word go.",2,22-11-2021 11:59,23-11-2021,NULL,28-01-2022 23:06,37,0,5,NULL,NULL,0,NULL,0,0,0,NULL,305,project,0,1,0,0,0,0,0,0,1,0

*Step 1: Meeting #1 - Discussing your vision.*
A Zoom meeting with you is the first step. We will dive deep into your business vision and jot down all the relevant information that is vital to tell your story.

We will cover topics like:
-Industry Focus or Niche
-Solution Focus
-Content Focus
-Your Existing Ideas
-Any new concepts or ideas that we can explore

You may have a directory idea like Yellow Pages or Angie’
column2: s List or a completely unique idea like Uber (minus the online cab booking.) No matter what, it is important to define what your directory should have in terms of the 7W&#8217
column3: s. This is BD Growth Suite&#8217
column4:
s strategy to setting up winning business directories which we have refined throughout the years by serving 500+ directory owners and setting up 100+ business directories.

*The 7Ws:* What your site is about? Where do you wish to launch? Why are you launching the site (your vision or dream behind the idea)? What is the ONE Primary Problem you wish to solve? 8039,W3 - Step 7: Meeting 4 - Handover and Launch Support,"*Step 7: Meeting #4 - Handover and Launch Support*

In this step, we hand over the website to you and you are ready to launch.


During the handover, we will train you with the Brilliant Directories software. We will show you how to change categories or manage members and content, and answer any other questions that you may have. After working with the BD Growth Suite Team, you will not need any additional support from a VA for daily management or backend maintenance of our website. We will give you the skills required to do things yourself.

We, however, provide you with 1 week of free launch support that specifically includes any content additions or blog articles additions, or clearing your additional questions on the software. Simply create a support ticket or email us, and seek assistance from us.

You can even write a few articles and send them to us (during the launch support week). We will upload those on your website to help build your credibility from the word go.",3,14-01-2022 12:39,14-01-2022,NULL,17-02-2022 13:21,37,0,5,NULL,NULL,0,NULL,0,0,0,NULL,324,project,0,1,0,0,0,0,0,0,1,0

8096,Membership Plans,"Make similar adjustments in the membership plans based on it.

We will make a few tiers/membership levels: Free Listing, Bronze, Silver, Gold, and Diamond Plans.

Free listing: free

Bronze: $25/mo

Silver: $49/mo

Gold: $99/mo (but publicly signup is not enabled since we will restrict it to only two businesses per category per city at max at this level.)

Diamond: $200/mo (but publicly signup is not enabled since we will restrict it to only one business per category per city at max at this level.)



Bronze, Silver, Gold, and Diamond members will be featured on top of search results and then the free members will show up.

Bronze, Silver, Gold, and Diamond members can add banners on their profile page.

Free members cannot upload a banner pic, the links to their websites will be no-follow, their phone number and address won't be shown publicly.",2,22-01-2022 17:40,22-01-2022,NULL,17-05-2022 20:13,37,0,5,NULL,NULL,0,NULL,0,0,0,NULL,328,project,0,1,0,0,0,0,0,0,1,0

8386,W3 - Step 7: Meeting 4 - Handover and Launch Support,"*Step 7: Meeting #4 - Handover and Launch Support*

In this step, we hand over the website to you and you are ready to launch.


During the handover, we will train you with the Brilliant Directories software. We will show you how to change categories or manage members and content, and answer any other questions that you may have. After working with the BD Growth Suite Team, you will not need any additional support from a VA for daily management or backend maintenance of our website. We will give you the skills required to do things yourself.

We, however, provide you with 1 week of free launch support that specifically includes any content additions or blog articles additions, or clearing your additional questions on the software. Simply create a support ticket or email us, and seek assistance from us.

You can even write a few articles and send them to us (during the launch support week). We will upload those on your website to help build your credibility from the word go.",2,14-03-2022 17:19,14-03-2022,NULL,05-07-2022 16:16,37,0,5,NULL,NULL,0,NULL,0,0,0,NULL,344,project,0,1,0,0,0,0,0,0,1,0

10097,State Purchase approval mechanism in connecting 3 sites,"

Problem statement :

State purchasing on one site.
Description of problem: After signing up in Site B, he already purchased a state (Eg: S1).
Now, this member has access to site a, b and c. He has access to a state purchasing module on each of these three sites. He can go to site A and opt for S2 state, but this impact will not be visible in other two sites which will create a problem.



-------------------------------------------------------------------------
Solution:

We will modify the state purchasing mechanism in all the three sites and connect that module too together.
Right now, if a member signs up in SiteA and opts for S1 State, and if you approve using 3-in-1 plugin and make it activated in the other two sites, this member gets auto-opted for S1 state in all three sites. This is already done and working.
What we will now modify in all three sites will be: If the same member opts for S2 state(for example) either in SiteA or B or C, the same S2 state gets opted in all the three sites. And, when in the admin state approval plugin if you approve that S2 state, it approves in all the sites. Hence, we are doing this two things:
i) We are modifying the state purchase experience inside members dashboard to connect with all three sites.
ii) We are also modifying state approval plugin in one site where 3-in-1 plugin exists such that all state approval requests from all the three sites starts coming under one site plugin only, so you need not go to three admin logins to approve, and once you approve, the approval will happen in all the respective three sites right from one admin login where the plugin is.
Note: We will deprecate plugins in other two sites (the state approval plugin)

10972,1.Supplier Card on Member Dashboard (Point 1&2 of project overview),"

1. Supplier Card on Member Dashboard
The below description is for 1 and 2 both:

Our development includes a new feature named ""Supplier Card"" that will be added to the member dashboard. This feature will enable members to add booths on their own. A link named ""Add Supplier Card"" will be displayed in the dashboard's sidebar. When clicked, it will open a new page where the left-hand side will have input fields to add all the necessary information for a new booth.

On the right-hand side, a ""Booth Preview"" card will be available, allowing members to preview their booth with the information they have added on the left side instantly. Initially, the booth preview will have some default placeholder for text and images.
Once a member submits a booth it will have the status of Draft by default, once the admin approves it from the video publishing plugin it will be published.
We will short the booths on the event detail page according to how quickly they have filled out all the information for the particular booth

10974,3. Changes to the existing Video Publishing plugin,"

Changes to the existing Video Publishing plugin

Changing the presentation
Currently, the Video publishing plugin on the admin sidebar opens with all the available booths on the site when clicked. We intend to modify the plugin to open a list of Events we have on the site by clicking on the plugin link in the sidebar, with a ""Manage Booths"" button against each event. Upon clicking on the ""Manage Booths"" button, a new page will open, displaying a list of booths for the particular event post which is the current view of the plugin.
A new column is to be added to the plugin to display the status as either ""Draft"" or ""Published"".
We will add Approve or Reject button in the Manage column.
A new column is to be added before Video Details and after the Member column called Incomplete fields where it will show a list of all the fields members have not filled for the booth

Two buttons labeled ""Download Logo"" and ""Show Logo"" will be placed below the ""Select Member"" option on the Manage modal. When the ""Download Logo"" button is clicked, the logo of the member who created the booth will be downloaded. Clicking on the ""Show Logo"" button will open the logo image link in a new tab.
The email of each member will be displayed in the Member column, and clicking on it will open the default mail client, allowing the admin to write an email to the respective member.
New fields Company and Member name to include on the search form so we can search Booths by Company or Member name

In the Add Booth/Edit booth form Title and Description will be two different fields, and on the front end, it will show either title or description on the booth depending on the presentation mode (Presentation or Non Presentation).

11064,Disabling Location Field in Member Listings Search Sidebar for Notary Public Virtual (RON) Subcategories,"

Disable/remove the Location field in the Member Listings Search sidebar when someone selects Notary Public in Sub Category and 'Virtual (RON)' in sub sub category. The Location field will be placed after Sub Category and Sub Sub Category, and programmatically disabled or removed if the user selects the above-mentioned sub-categories. To achieve this functionality, we can use JavaScript/jQuery to detect the selection of Sub Category and Sub Sub Category fields and disable/remove the Location field accordingly.

The functionality to disable/remove the Location field in the Member Listings Search sidebar based on sub-category selection will be added to two places: the homepage search form and the search result sidebar. By implementing this functionality in both places, users will be able to search for notaries more effectively and efficiently. This will provide a consistent user experience throughout the website and help to improve the overall usability of the search functionality.

*Step 7: Meeting #4 - Handover and Launch Support*

In this step, we hand over the website to you and you are ready to launch.


During the handover, we will train you with the Brilliant Directories software. We will show you how to change categories or manage members and content, and answer any other questions that you may have. After working with the BD Growth Suite Team, you will not need any additional support from a VA for daily management or backend maintenance of our website. We will give you the skills required to do things yourself.

We, however, provide you with 1 week of free launch support that specifically includes any content additions or blog articles additions, or clearing your additional questions on the software. Simply create a support ticket or email us, and seek assistance from us.

You can even write a few articles and send them to us (during the launch support week). We will upload those on your website to help build your credibility from the word go.

11299,Custom Login module for Favourite ,"

We will be working on personalizing the login popup that appears when a user who is not logged in clicks ""Add to my list."" The popup will only prompt for an email address, without any login or registration buttons. The heading will be ""Enter your email.""

When a user enters their email and clicks the ""Login/Signup"" button, the system will check if an account already exists. If an account is found, it will ask for a password to log in. If no account exists, a new account will be created for the user in the background, and in the background, an email will be sent to the user containing a password. This password can be used for future logins.

>Issue reported by client:

Connecting header search to search_results dropdown bar works great. 13324,"3) Using your listings limits to import, 20k records","

VA will search the businesses/categories in a given city of the county via the business finder feature in BD Admin and import the same into your website. This way a VA will work for all the counties.

If you select 50 main categories (Eg: plumber, electrician, AC repairs, roofers.)

and if each country had an average of 7 locations (cities, suburbs), that's 7 counties x 7 = 49 (about 50 places.)

So, VA will enter the name of one category, enter one place, and hit search. Then select businesses from whatever results come up, and import. And, then checks inside the website and database to be double sure. Deletes duplicates if any. This process takes 10-15 minutes. It can take even more or less. And doing it for 50 places for one category. And, like that doing it for 50 categories.
